subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Self-Sufficient! At the earliest dawn of the Morn of Truth, Shíraz became a retreat of mysteries, and the song of the Concourse on High began to play
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حضرت بی نیاز شیراز در بدایت طلوع صبح حقیقت خلوتگه راز شد و آهنگ
subcodes.subjects: @composure; tranquillity; serenity, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @Declaration; advent of the Bab, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
